# Ankit Bhavarthe

> Ankit Bhavarthe (Bhavarthe Ankit Budhaji) is a Full Stack Developer, UI/UX Designer, and Co-Founder of Kairos (a digital agency). Specializes in building scalable production applications with Next.js, React, Node.js, Express, AWS, and serverless architectures.

## Contact Information
- **Email**: ankitbhavarthe.dev@gmail.com
- **Alternative Email**: bhavartheankit@gmail.com
- **Phone**: +91 93930 48875
- **Location**: Ulhasnagar, India
- **GitHub**: [github.com/Ankit-2563](https://github.com/Ankit-2563)
- **LinkedIn**: [linkedin.com/in/ankit-bhavarthe-860822290](https://www.linkedin.com/in/ankit-bhavarthe-860822290/)
- **Twitter**: [x.com/AnkitBhava4934](https://x.com/AnkitBhava4934)

## Key Details
- **Current Role**: Co-Founder & Full Stack Developer at Kairos (April 2025 – Present)
- **Education**: B.E. in Computer Engineering from Shivajirao S. Jondhale College of Engineering (CGPA: 8.04, Dec 2021 – May 2025)
- **Patent Application**: Published Patent Application No. 202421077920 – "Python-Based Metro Ticketing using Face Recognition"
- **Primary Tech Stack**: TypeScript, React, Next.js, Node.js, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, AWS (Lambda, Amplify, S3), TensorFlow.js, OpenCV, Gemini AI
